name: OmopPractitionerProviderView
title: Practitioner → provider (FHIR-flat, stage 1)
description: Stage 1: one row per Practitioner. NPI is captured separately because Synthea Encounter.participant.individual.reference uses search-by-identifier syntax with NPI, not the Practitioner.id UUID. Stage 2 will store NPI in provider_source_value so encounter FK resolution works.

column.name: id
column.description: FHIR Practitioner.id (Synthea UUID). Kept for traceability but NOT used as provider_source_value (see npi).

column.name: npi
column.description: US National Provider Identifier. → provider_source_value so encounter participant lookup works.
